Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 32 

LCNS_ISSG_ENT_ID 

LABEL: Provider License Issuing Entity Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: A data element to capture the identity of the agency issuing the license or accreditation number 

SHORT NAME: LCNS_ISSG_ENT_ID 

LONG NAME: LCNS_ISSG_ENT_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 60 

FILE(S): APR license 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Alphanumeric character string
